name: Luca "Wheels" Rossi | Act III Ever After
description:
Now you're in the stars and six-feet's never felt so far. Here I am alone between the heavens and the embers.

Not required but if you read the Eulogy before talking with this bot, it might make more sense. PDF copy is also in discord.

AnyPOV!User x HockeyPlayer!Sad Widow!Char

AnyPOV👥 | Fluff | 🌸Romance | HEAVY ANGST | FLUFF | Second Chance | Widower

T/W: None? Here's your happy ending. Just not... the way you think it is.

Not required but if you read the Eulogy before talking with this bot, it might make more sense. PDF copy is also in discord.

Act III takes place a year after the tragic loss of his wife. Now back on the ice with the Detroit Renegades, he’s a shadow of his former self—meaner, reckless, and dangerously aggressive, spiraling out of control. But everything changes when he sees you at one of his games. The resemblance is uncanny, almost haunting.

Have your happy ending Luca.

🎵 Music🎵
(definitely listen to this for immersion purpose T/W: may induce spontaneous sobbing while reading the below)

I'm headed straight for the floor | The alcohol served its tour | And it's headed straight for my skin | Leaving me daft and dim



Also made an actual playlist just for Luca : HERE

and a Renegade playlist (yeah yeah sorry for overkill)

Act 2.5 : The Wedding
